name: Almond Spice Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and 1/8 teaspoon salt on a sheet of waxed paper. Set aside.
2. Cream the sugar, butter, and orange zest in a mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg yolk and combine well. On low speed, add the flour mixture, allspice, and almonds. Mix well.
4. Use 1 tablespoon dough to form each cookie, spacing them about 2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
5. Gently flatten the dough with fingers into 2-inch rounds.
6. Froth the egg and remaining 1/8 teaspoon salt with a fork in a small bowl. Lightly brush the glaze over the cookies (the remaining glaze can be refrigerated up to 5 days and used for other baking).
7. Bake at 350°F until the cookies are lightly browned around the edges, about 11 to 12 minutes.
8. Cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
9. Store at room temperature in an airtight tin for up to one week or freeze up to a month, wrapped airtight (thaw at room temperature in wrapping).
